headline: As Zscaler Doubles Down on AI Security, ZS Stock Still Needs More to Justify Its Steep Valuation
summary: Zscaler is leaning hard into AI security with a new acquisition and fresh product pushes, but the stock still needs stronger execution to justify its premium.

raw.headline: As Zscaler Doubles Down on AI Security, ZS Stock Still Needs More to Justify Its Steep Valuation

headline: Cognizant Technology Solutions (NASDAQ:CTSH) Scores as a Textbook 'Decent Value' Investment
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) offers value with strong fundamentals: an 8/10 valuation rating, 9/10 financial health, and 8/10 profitability. A low P/E of 9.68 and minimal debt make it a prime candidate for patient value investors seeking a margin of safety.
